preliminary_findings_from_pm: fetchCurrentOutput (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx L501-567) drives state.prompt / isSelectionListActive / Auto-Yes state in addition to state.terminal.*; issue pseudocode omits this.

SET_AUTO_SCROLL action also mutates state.terminal but does NOT match the 'SET_TERMINAL_*' glob the issue uses; issue undercounts actions to remove (4 not 3: SET_TERMINAL_OUTPUT/ACTIVE/THINKING + SET_AUTO_SCROLL).
Parent polling loop L1353-1367 gates interval on state.terminal.isActive; needs a replacement after removal.
CLI-tab change effect L605-619 calls setTerminalOutput/setTerminalActive/setTerminalThinking; must be cleaned up.
Double-polling: mobile useTerminalPanePolling + parent fetchCurrentOutput both hit /current-output. PC already has this pattern, but issue should state it explicitly.

state.prompt slice may become mobile-only dead code if mobile prompt moves to the hook; issue scope excludes state.prompt removal — design must decide whether mobile keeps parent-driven prompt or moves to hook.
